## Current Status Impact

```yaml
current_status_impact:
  status: updated | not_applicable | deferred
  reason:
  current_status_updated_in_this_pr: true | false
  follow_up_issue: none | "#<number>"
```

Use `docs/control/CURRENT_STATUS_POLICY.md`.
